name: spotify_scraper
title: Spotify Scraper
description: Search Spotify or retrieve public artist, track, album, podcast, and podcast episode data without a developer token.

seo.title: Spotify Scraper API for Artists, Tracks, Albums, and Podcasts
seo.description: Search Spotify or retrieve public artist, track, album, podcast, and podcast episode data as normalized JSON for agents and automation.
seo.intro: Spotify Scraper searches Spotify's public web catalogue, normalizes public oEmbed responses for four entity types, and extracts the initial public episode page from a podcast show. It returns canonical ids, URLs, titles, thumbnails, embed data, search results, or normalized episode metadata without requiring a Spotify developer application or user login.

useCases.title: Catalogue enrichment
useCases.description: Resolve pasted Spotify links into stable ids, titles, thumbnails, and entity types.

useCases.title: Media embeds
useCases.description: Collect Spotify's official iframe URL and embed markup for public playback surfaces.

useCases.title: Agent link inspection
useCases.description: Let an agent identify a Spotify artist, album, track, or podcast from one public URL.

useCases.title: Catalogue search
useCases.description: Find public tracks, artists, albums, playlists, podcasts, and episodes from one query.

faqs.question: Does this require a Spotify API token?
faqs.answer: No. It uses Spotify's public oEmbed endpoint and the public server-rendered podcast page.

faqs.question: Which Spotify URLs are supported?
faqs.answer: Public artist, track, album, and show URLs are supported. Use search mode with a query to search the public catalogue, or podcast_episodes mode with a show URL to return its initial public episode listing.

faqs.question: Does it return private listening data?
faqs.answer: No. It does not authenticate a Spotify user and cannot access private libraries, history, or account data.

mode.description: Spotify operation. Entity type is inferred from url when omitted; search and podcast_episodes must be explicit.

url.description: Public open.spotify.com artist, track, album, or show URL.

spotify_id.description: Spotify entity id. Use together with mode when url is omitted.

query.description: Public catalogue search query. Required in search mode.

max_results.description: Maximum normalized search results to return.

total_episodes.description: Total episode count reported by Spotify

next_cursor.description: Next public episode offset reported by Spotify

episodes.description: Public podcast episodes available in the server-rendered show page
